---
title: "Benchmark And Case"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Benchmark And Case}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, eval=FALSE}
library(ncfigR)
metrics <- readr::read_tsv(system.file("extdata/benchmark_metrics.tsv", package = "ncfigR"))
embedding <- readr::read_tsv(system.file("extdata/embedding.tsv", package = "ncfigR"))
p1 <- plot_benchmark_heatmap(metrics, metric_col = "metric")
p2 <- plot_embedding_panel(embedding, color_col = "cell_type")
fig <- compose_nc_figure(list(p1, p2), ncol = 2, title = "Benchmark and case")
```
